full_text:
Wang Si (Chengzong) 王嗣 (承宗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Si (王嗣), styledChengzong (承宗), was born in Zizhong in Jianwei. Earned the respect of the Qiang and Hu. Died from an arrow wound against Wei. Wang Si was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
